worldData.instructions:
NOCTURNE DISTRICT — the city as a pinball table

CLICK & HOLD — draw the ball to your hand · it grabs when it arrives
DRAG & RELEASE — a real throw
W / S — raise and lower the ball

Red interceptors run the street at you. Smash them with a FAST ball:
dull-red drifters weave · crimson dodgers juke your throws · blazing hunters burn for the line
A slow held ball in traffic gets RAMMED out of your hand.

Three hearts. Every ship that slips past costs one; three gone resets the night.
Clear ten ships to end a wave — a heart comes back, and the street gets meaner.

stepHooks.author: fable
stepHooks.description: Static pinball district: pinned towers, engine physics, ball leashed on stage. + grab & throw the ball (screen-projected pick, plane drag, velocity release).

stepHooks.author: fable
